testsuite.name: presentation.routes.UserRoutesTest

testcase.name: PATCH type returns 400 when user not found
PATCH type returns 200 with updated userType
GET profile returns 200 when user exists
POST register is idempotent for existing user
PATCH type returns 400 for invalid userType
GET profile returns 404 when user not found
